subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 750291012/241010924 is not a GRB
body:
Matt Godwin (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 750291012/241010924 at 22:10:07.55 UT
on 10 October 2024, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to local particles."
